subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O God, Lord of the worlds and Educator of the nations! Thou beholdest the tears of the lovers throughout all regions in their separation from Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا اله العالم و مربی الامم تری دموع العشاق فی الافاق فی هجرک و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for teaching, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
